= [[Domain Device]] =
== Thrones ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pawson Throne}}||[[Koryeon Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bladden Throne}}||[[Yamato Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Jaden Throne}}||[[Cathay Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Racky Throne}}||[[Murikan Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thundos Throne}}||[[Britland Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nethrone Throne}}||[[Kemetic Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Minerva Throne}}||[[Hellenic Domain]]
|}

== Domain Weapons ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cruise Missile}}||[[Koryeon Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Senbon Sakura}}||[[Yamato Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Calming Pearl}}||[[Cathay Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Funnel Cannon}}||[[Murikan Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thundercloud Stone}}||[[Britland Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ghost Coffin}}||[[Kemetic Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Holy Light Staff}}||[[Hellenic Domain]]
|}

== Domain Weapon Currency ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Missile Box}}||[[Koryeon Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sword Box}}||[[Yamato Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bead Box}}||[[Cathay Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Laser Prism Component}}||[[Murikan Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Lightning Rune}}||[[Britland Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|}}||[[Kemetic Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Holy Wood Core}}||[[Hellenic Domain]]
|}

= [[Rocket]] =
Icons to do with repairing the Rocket.

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cockpit}}||Also Cockpit I, II, III
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bunker}}||Also Bunker I, II, III
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thruster}}||Also Thruster I, II, III, IV, V
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Core (Rocket)}}||[[Yamato_Cards#Tier_3_(Blue)|Yamato Card]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Immortal Engine}}||[[Cathay_Cards#Tier_3_(Blue)|Cathay Card]]
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Rocket]]
